moves.name: Fire Spin
moves.description: Leaves the target trapped.

moves.name: X Defense All
moves.description: Raises the Defense of all allied sync pairs by two stat ranks.

moves.name: Thermal Inferno
moves.description: Activation Condition: When the sync buff of the user’s team is one or more. Deactivation Condition: Cannot be deactivated. Never misses. Leaves the target burned.

moves.name: Hot Enough for You?
moves.description: Restores an ally’s HP by approximately 40% of its maximum HP. Applies the Damage Guard Next effect to an ally. Applies the Enduring effect to an ally.

moves.name: Steamed Up Tera Blast
moves.description: The more the user’s Sp. Atk is raised, the greater the power of this attack.

passives.name: Debut: Fire S-Tera
passives.description: The user Sync Terastallizes into Fire type the first time it enters a battle each battle.

passives.name: Debut: Sunny & Extension 5
passives.description: Makes the weather sunny the first time the user enters a battle each battle. Extends the duration of sunny weather when the weather turns sunny while the user is on the field.

passives.name: Soften Up 1
passives.description: Critical hits land more easily when the user attacks with a sync move.

teraMove.name: Cuprite Tera Blast
teraMove.description: Never misses. The power of this move is not lowered even if there are multiple targets. Applies the Special Move Break effect to the target the first time this attack move is successful each battle. Reduces the user’s sync move countdown by three the first time this attack move is successful each battle. This attack’s power is multiplied by 10 if the user’s team does not have a sync buff and if this attack has been used two times or less. Applies the Free Move Next effect to the user if its team has a sync buff or if this attack has been used three times or more.

teraPassives.name: Fiery Steam
teraPassives.description: Grants all of the following effects when the user Sync Terastallizes: Raises the user’s Sp. Atk by four stat ranks. Raises the user’s critical-hit rate by three stat ranks. Applies the Supereffective ↑ Next effect to the user. Increases the user’s Special Moves ↑ Next effect by two ranks.

cells.description: Has a chance (40%) of charging the user’s move gauge by one when its move is successful.

cells.title: Fire Spin: Dashing Team 9
cells.description: Raises the Speed of all allied sync pairs by one stat rank when the user’s attack move is successful.

cells.title: Fire Spin: Hit: Team Apply Status Change 9
cells.description: When the user inflicts a status change on an opponent with the additional effects of a move, inflicts the same status change on all opposing sync pairs.

cells.title: Ruthless 9
cells.description: Lowers one of the target’s following stats by two stat ranks at random when the user’s attack move is successful against a flinching, confused, or trapped opponent: Attack, Defense, Sp. Atk, Sp. Def, Speed, accuracy, or evasiveness.

If the remaining MP for the user’s Dark Wish is one or more when attacking with this move, reduces those MP by one and grants all of the following effects: Turns the field of play’s zone into a Dark Zone. moves.name: Relaxed Charm
moves.description: Activation Condition: When the user is asleep. Deactivation Condition: When the user is not asleep. Never misses. Lowers the Attack of all opposing sync pairs by three stat ranks. Increases the Special Moves ↑ Next effect of all allied sync pairs by two ranks. Applies Paldea Circle (Special) to the allied field of play. Paldea Circle (Special) grants all of the following effects: Powers up the special attack moves and special sync moves of all allied sync pairs by 10%. Reduces special attack move and special sync move damage taken by all allied sync pairs by 5%. The more sync pairs with the Paldea theme that are on the allied field of play, the higher these percentages are. (Each additional sync pair powers up moves and sync moves by 10% and reduces damage by 3%. The maximum power-up is 40%, and the maximum damage reduction is 14%.)

cells.title: Courage to Continue Ice Beam: Move Gauge Refresh 2
cells.description: Has a chance (30%) of charging the user’s move gauge by one when its move is successful.

cells.title: Courage to Continue Ice Beam: Power 4
cells.description: Courage to Continue Ice Beam: Power ↑ 4

cells.title: Recharging Strike 9
cells.description: Charges the user’s move gauge by one when its attack move hits. If the move has the Multistrike effect tag, charges the user’s move gauge by one for each hit.

cells.title: Hit: Special Boost ↑1 9
cells.description: Increases the user’s Special Moves ↑ Next effect by one rank when its attack move is successful.

cells.title: Great Strides Blizzard: Move Gauge Refresh 2
cells.description: Has a chance (30%) of charging the user’s move gauge by one when its move is successful.

cells.title: Healthy Healing
cells.description: Applies the Gradual Healing effect to the user if its HP is full when it enters a battle.

cells.title: Ally Sets Circle: Special Boost ↑1 9
cells.description: Increases the user’s Special Moves ↑ Next effect by one rank when an ally applies a circle to the allied field of play.

cells.title: Brainpower
cells.description: The more the user’s Sp. Atk is raised, the more it powers up its sync move.

cells.title: Antifreeze
cells.description: Prevents the user from becoming frozen.

cells.title: Ice Zone: HP Recovery 1
cells.description: Restores the user’s HP whenever its Pokémon takes an action when the zone is an Ice Zone.

cells.title: We’ll Go All Out!: MP Refresh 2
cells.description: Has a chance (30%) of restoring one MP of the user’s move when that move is successful.

cells.title: Ice Zone: MG → 2
cells.description: Quickly charges the move gauge when the zone is an Ice Zone.

cells.title: Satisfied Snicker 9
cells.description: Lowers the target’s Sp. Atk by one stat rank when the user’s attack move against it is successful.

cells.title: P-Moves & S-Moves Crit
cells.description: Except in certain circumstances, successful hits with the user’s following attacks become critical hits: Pokémon’s moves or sync move.

syncMoveName: Reign of Dragon’s Blood Tera Blast

moves.name: Thunder Wave
moves.description: Leaves the target paralyzed.

moves.name: Paldea Analysis
moves.description: Increases the Special Moves ↑ Next effect of all allied sync pairs by one rank. Applies Paldea Circle (Special) to the allied field of play. Paldea Circle (Special) grants all of the following effects: Powers up the special attack moves and special sync moves of all allied sync pairs by 10%. Reduces special attack move and special sync move damage taken by all allied sync pairs by 5%. The more sync pairs with the Paldea theme that are on the allied field of play, the higher these percentages are. (Each additional sync pair powers up moves and sync moves by 10% and reduces damage by 3%. The maximum power-up is 40%, and the maximum damage reduction is 14%.)

moves.name: Steel Flash Dragon Pulse
moves.description: Activation Condition: When the user uses any move once. Deactivation Condition: When this move is used. Never misses. Lowers the target’s Sp. Def by two stat ranks. The power of this move is not lowered even if there are multiple targets. This attack’s power increases 50% when the target is paralyzed.

moves.name: What I Like to Hear!
moves.description: Increases the Special Moves ↑ Next effect of an ally by five ranks. Applies the Enduring effect to an ally.

moves.name: Reign of Dragon’s Blood Tera Blast
moves.description: This attack’s power increases when the target is paralyzed.

passives.name: Debut: Dragon S-Tera
passives.description: The user Sync Terastallizes into Dragon type the first time it enters a battle each battle.

passives.name: User Sets Paldea C (Spec): Team Special Boost 1
passives.description: Increases the Special Moves ↑ Next effect of all allied sync pairs by one rank when the user applies Paldea Circle (Special) to the allied field of play.

passives.name: 1st Use Status P-Move on Opp: Special Break & Dragon Zone
passives.description: Applies the Special Move Break effect to the target the first time the user’s Pokémon uses a status move targeting the opponent each battle. Turns the field of play’s zone into a Dragon Zone the first time the user’s Pokémon uses a status move targeting the opponent each battle. (A Dragon Zone powers up Dragon-type attacks.)

teraMove.name: Sapphire Tera Blast
teraMove.description: Leaves the target either flinching, confused, or trapped. If the remaining MP for the user’s Paldea Analysis is one or more when attacking with this move, reduces those MP by one and grants all of the following effects: Restores one MP of the user’s buddy move. Increases the Special Moves ↑ Next effect of all allied sync pairs by one rank. Applies Paldea Circle (Special) to the allied field of play. Paldea Circle (Special) grants all of the following effects: Powers up the special attack moves and special sync moves of all allied sync pairs by 10%. Reduces special attack move and special sync move damage taken by all allied sync pairs by 5%. The more sync pairs with the Paldea theme that are on the allied field of play, the higher these percentages are. (Each additional sync pair powers up moves and sync moves by 10% and reduces damage by 3%. The maximum power-up is 40%, and the maximum damage reduction is 14%.)

teraPassives.name: Life Strolling on the Scenic Path
teraPassives.description: Grants all of the following effects when the user Sync Terastallizes: Applies Paldea Circle (Special) to the allied field of play. Raises the user’s Sp. Atk by four stat ranks. Raises the user’s critical-hit rate by three stat ranks.

cells.title: Circle: MG → 2
cells.description: Quickly charges the move gauge when a circle applies to the allied field of play.

cells.title: Dragon Zone: Team Moves ↑ 2
cells.description: Powers up the moves of all allied sync pairs when the zone is a Dragon Zone.

cells.title: 1st S-Move: Dragon Zone & Extension 3
cells.description: Turns the field of play’s zone into a Dragon Zone the first time the user’s sync move is used each battle. (A Dragon Zone powers up Dragon-type attacks.) Extends the duration of the Dragon Zone when the zone turns into a Dragon Zone while the user is on the field.

cells.title: Circle: Attack Move DR 2
cells.description: Reduces damage when the user is hit by an attack move while a circle applies to the allied field of play.

cells.title: Circle: Team S-Moves ↑ 3
cells.description: Powers up the sync moves of all allied sync pairs when a circle applies to the allied field of play.

cells.title: 1st “Paldea Analysis” MP 0: Restore MP 1
cells.description: Restores one MP of the user’s Paldea Analysis the first time the remaining MP for that move is zero each battle.

cells.title: Clearheaded
cells.description: Prevents the user from becoming confused.

cells.title: Steel Flash Dragon Pulse: Move Gauge Refresh 3
cells.description: Has a chance (40%) of charging the user’s move gauge by one when its move is successful.

cells.title: Soften Up 1
cells.description: Critical hits land more easily when the user attacks with a sync move.

cells.title: Dragon Zone: HP Recovery 1
cells.description: Restores the user’s HP whenever its Pokémon takes an action when the zone is a Dragon Zone.

cells.title: Foul Fighting 3
cells.description: Powers up the user’s moves against targets that are flinching, confused, or trapped.

cells.title: Sapphire Tera Blast: Move Gauge Refresh 3
cells.description: Has a chance (40%) of charging the user’s move gauge by one when its move is successful.

cells.title: Sapphire Tera Blast: Shocked Hit Freebie 9
cells.description: Applies the Free Move Next effect to the user when its attack move is successful against a paralyzed opponent.

cells.title: Hit Paralyzed Opp: Attack ↓2 9
cells.description: Lowers the target’s Attack by two stat ranks when the user’s attack move is successful against a paralyzed opponent.

cells.title: Thunder Wave: Move Gauge Refresh 3
cells.description: Has a chance (40%) of charging the user’s move gauge by one when its move is successful.

cells.title: Afflicter’s Fervor 1
cells.description: Reduces the sync move countdown by one the first time the user’s Pokémon uses a status move each battle.

cells.title: Thunder Wave: 1st Move Use: Team Special Boost 1
cells.description: Increases the Special Moves ↑ Next effect of all allied sync pairs by one rank the first time the user’s move is used each battle.

cells.title: Circle: S-Moves ↑ 9
cells.description: Powers up the user’s sync move when a circle applies to the allied field of play.

cells.title: Paldea Analysis: MP Refresh 2
cells.description: Has a chance (30%) of restoring one MP of the user’s move when that move is successful.

cells.title: What I Like to Hear!: Move on Ally: Supereffective ↑ Next 9
cells.description: When the user’s move targeting an allied sync pair (excluding field effects) is successful, applies the Supereffective ↑ Next effect to the allied sync pair affected by the move.

cells.title: Paldea C (Spec) Extension 3
cells.description: Extends the duration of Paldea Circle (Special) when Paldea Circle (Special) is applied to the allied field of play.

cells.title: 1st Use Status P-Move: Sp. Atk ↑ 2
cells.description: Raises the user’s Sp. Atk by two stat ranks the first time its Pokémon uses a status move each battle.

cells.title: Reign of Dragon’s Blood Tera Blast: Power 25
cells.description: Reign of Dragon’s Blood Tera Blast: Power ↑ 25

cells.title: Reign of Dragon’s Blood Tera Blast: Power 25
